REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT MICHAEL KRAMER, MICHAEL LUSTBADER, MARK SHVARTSMAN, AND ALEX SHVARTSMAN'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE EACH ELEMENT OF EACH CAUSE OF ACTION AS DESCRIBED IN THE OPPOSITION PERTAIN TO EACH FENCE A AND/OR FENCE B. (SEE OPPOSITION 2:24-27). NO REFERENCES TO FENCE A OR FENCE B CAN BE FOUND IN THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE COURT ALSO NOTES THAT THE ALLEGATIONS AS TO THE PENDENCY OF APPEAL ARE MADE "AS OF THE FILING OF THIS COMPLAINT" (E.G. SEE FAC 4:24-25) NOT AS OF THE FILING OF THE OPERATIVE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: A. REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS MICHAEL KRAMER, MICHAEL LUSTBADER, MARK SHVARTSMAN, AND ALEX SHVARTSMAN'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE (1) THAT DBI IS NOT TAKING ANY ACTION REGARDING THE ALLEGEDLY NON-COMPLIANT CONSTRUCTION OF THE FENCE; (2) TO ATTACH A COPY OF THE PLANS AND THE PERMIT AND INDICATE HOW THE FENCE, AS CURRENTLY CONSTRUCTED, VIOLATES THE PERMITS AND THE ORDINANCES WITH SPECIFIC REFERENCES TO THE PERMIT AND THE LAW; (3) TO ALLEGE NON-SPECULATIVE DAMAGES. SEE TO KOLL-IRVINE CENTER PROPERTY OWNERS ASSN. V. COUNTY OF ORANGE (1994) 24 CAL.APP.4TH 1036; AND (4) TO ASSERT INJUNCTIVE RELIEF AS A REMEDY. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: A. PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2017 Continued To Sep-06-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-07-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs MICHAEL KRAMER, MICHAEL LUSTBADER, MARK SHVARTSMAN, and ALEX SHVARTSMAN's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege (1) that DBI is not taking any action regarding the allegedly non-compliant construction of the fence; (2) to attach a copy of the Plans and the Permit and indicate how the fence, as currently constructed, violates the permits and the Ordinances with specific references to the permit and the law; (3) to allege non-speculative damages. See to Koll-Irvine Center Property Owners Assn. v. County of Orange (1994) 24 Cal.App.4th 1036; and (4) to assert injunctive relief as a remedy. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-07-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs MICHAEL KRAMER, MICHAEL LUSTBADER, MARK SHVARTSMAN, and ALEX SHVARTSMAN's MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is Moot, in light of ruling on the demurrer. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-22-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MICHAEL KRAMER, MICHAEL LUSTBADER, MARK SHVARTSMAN, and ALEX SHVARTSMAN's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege each element of each cause of action as described in the opposition pertain to each Fence A and/or Fence B. (See Opposition 2:24-27). No references to Fence A or Fence B can be found in the First Amended Complaint. The Court also notes that the allegations as to the pendency of appeal are made "as of the filing of this Complaint" (e.g. See FAC 4:24-25) not as of the filing of the operative First Amended Complaint. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)
